raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad klauxtja Ben-Adade
am Kehnixam Affum/ un fuḥ-
tja fawus Karra Wirfneekus
prett Israëta Pilsfahteem/ un
ee katwe Ejonu/ un Danu / un
Abel Mainu/ un wiffus Naw-
nta Spihkeru Pilsfahtus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad nu Baësus to dsirde-
a/ tad atstahje wiꞥſch Rahmu
astaifſht / un winna Darbs
nittejahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme tas Kehnixsch
Affus winnu Juhda/ un tee no-
neffe tohs Afminius un Kohkus
io Rahmas/ fo Baësus bij uṣ-
aiſijs/ un wiꞥſch ustaisija no
eem Gebu un Mizpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tanni Laika nahze A-
anus tas Redsetajs pee Affu to
Kehnixu no Juhda/ un tazzija
s to: Tapehz ka tu effi us to
Kehnixu no Sihrijas patahwees/
n ne patahwees us to KUNgu
iwu Deewu/ tadeht irr ta Keh-
ika no Sihrijas Katra-Spehks
o tawas Rohkas tspruzzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neggi tee Mohru Landis
n Libexi bija leels Karra-
Spehks/ ar kohti dands Ratteem
n Jahtneekeem? tatschu kad tu
s to KUNGU patahwees/ tad
e wiꞥſch tohs tawā Rohkā
ewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta KUNGU Azizē
attahs zaur wiffahn Sem-
ehim/ ka wiꞥſch tohs stiprina /
s ar skairen Sirōi pee winna
rrahs. Tu sche effi aplain
rrijs/ jo no tcht Laika buhs
axti prett tevi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Affus apskaitahs
prett to Redsetajn/ un liſte to
Zeetumā/ jo wiꞥſch par to bija
kunntigs prett winnu: Jr Af-
fus apbehdinaja zittus no teem
Zaudim tanni Laikā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un raugi/ tahs Leetahs
Affus/ tik labbi tahs pirnas ka
tahs pehdejas/ irr rakstitas to
Kehnixu no Juhda un Israëta
Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un trihsdefmits detvita
Gaddā winna Waldischanas/
tappe Affus neweffels pee ta-
wahi Kahjahm/ un winna Ne-
weffeliba auge leelā anguma/
wiꞥſch arri eekſch jawas Newef-
felebas ne mekleja to KUNGU/
bet tohs Ahrstes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta atsmigge Affus ar
jaweem Tehweem / un nomirre
zettortadefmits pirma Gaddā ja-
wah Waldischanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee aprakfe to winna
Rappā / ko wiꞥſch preekſch ſewi
lizzis rakt Dahwida Pilli/ un
likte to us to Gultu/ ko wiꞥſch
bij ar dahrgahm Sahlehm un
wiﬀadahm Rwehpja - Sahlehm
pildijs/ un Apteekeeu Darbā pa-
taistijs/ un tee dedsinaja pahr
winnu (dahrgas Sahles) ar
lectu Dedsinatchanu.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
